title: 2016-2017 Copper Basin Caribou and Moose Community Subsistence Harvest Permit Program
summary: Applications for the 2016-2017 Copper Basin Caribou and Moose Community Subsistence Harvest Permit Program can only be completed online from November 1, 2015 to December 15, 2015 – 5:00 p.m. CSH Participants must get a 2016-2017 group number from the CSH Coordinator.
